# Validation Checklist

Use this checklist after conversion.

## Documents
- Spot-check key pages
- Verify fonts and layout are readable
- Confirm page count matches

## Tables
- Verify headers and row counts
- Confirm delimiter/encoding correctness
- Check formula preservation when applicable

## Images
- Confirm dimensions and orientation
- Spot-check color fidelity
- Verify transparency handling

## GIF
- Check animation plays correctly
- Verify frame count and timing
- Confirm optimization reduces file size

## Video
- Confirm duration and playback
- Check audio track presence if expected
- Verify resolution and aspect ratio

## Audio
- Confirm duration and playback
- Check audio quality and sync
- Verify format compatibility

## OCR
- Spot-check extracted text accuracy
- Verify complete text extraction
- Check for OCR artifacts or errors

## CAD
- Confirm geometry preservation
- Verify dimensions and coordinates
- Check entity types are maintained

## Subtitles
- Verify timing alignment
- Check text content preservation
- Confirm format compliance (VTT/SRT)
